about.heading: About Pure Nail Bar
body: Pure Nail Bar is a serene and stylish sanctuary in Vancouver, where elegance meets precision in the art of nail care. From classic manicures to intricate nail art, our certified technicians bring years of expertise to every service.

We set the standard for premium nail care with a commitment to quality, hygiene and artistry. We use only the finest professional-grade products and follow hospital-grade sterilization protocols, so every visit is as safe as it is beautiful.

With more than 2,000 happy clients and five studios across Greater Vancouver, we've designed every detail — from our relaxing atmosphere to our skilled artists — to help you unwind, escape and indulge in pure pampering.

gel-nails.title: Gel Nails in Vancouver
gel-nails.heroAlt: Glossy gel manicure with a flawless finish at Pure Nail Bar
intro: Our gel nail services pair long-lasting wear with a flawless, high-shine finish that stays perfect for weeks. From a clean, natural gel manicure to a custom-sculpted acrylic full set, our certified technicians shape, build and finish your nails exactly the way you want.

We never rush the details. Every set follows a careful, unhurried process with premium, professional-grade products — because the difference between a good manicure and a great one lives in the finish: even cuticles, a precise polish line and a shape that flatters your hands.
gel-nails.whyUs: Clients across Vancouver trust Pure Nail Bar for consistency: skilled, certified artists, premium products and hospital-grade hygiene at every visit. Whether you want subtle elegance or bold nail art, you'll leave with a result that lasts.
included: Nail shaping and meticulous cuticle care
Your choice of gel manicure or acrylic full set
A precise, long-wearing, high-shine finish
Access to a wide range of colours and finishes
Honest advice on shape, length and design
A relaxing, sterilized service environment
addons: Custom hand-painted nail art and seasonal designs
Length and shape customization on full sets
gel-nails.duration: About 45–75 minutes, depending on the set and add-ons.
gel-nails.aftercare: Apply cuticle oil daily and wear gloves for cleaning or dishwashing — water and harsh detergents are the main cause of early chips and lifting. When it's time for a change, book a proper removal rather than peeling, which takes the top layer of your natural nail with it.
gel-nails.hygiene: Your safety comes first. Every tool is sanitized to hospital-grade standards and single-use items are discarded after each client — the protocol behind every Pure Nail Bar service.

faq.q: How long does a gel manicure last?
faq.a: A gel manicure typically lasts two to three weeks without chipping. We'll recommend the finish that best fits your routine and how quickly your nails grow.

faq.q: Do you do acrylic full sets and nail art?
faq.a: Yes. We offer custom-sculpted acrylic full sets in your choice of shape and length, plus hand-painted nail art and intricate designs.

faq.q: What's the difference between gel and regular polish?
faq.a: Gel is cured under a lamp for a glossy, flexible finish that resists chips for two to three weeks; regular polish air-dries and chips sooner. We'll recommend the best option for your plans.

gel-nails.metaTitle: Gel Nails & Acrylics in Vancouver | Pure Nail Bar
gel-nails.metaDescription: Gel manicures, acrylic full sets and custom nail art with a flawless, long-wearing finish. Book online — from $45.

feet.title: Spa Pedicures in Vancouver
feet.heroAlt: Relaxing spa pedicure in progress at Pure Nail Bar
intro: Our spa pedicure is the ultimate reset for tired feet. Each treatment pairs careful nail and skin care with a genuinely relaxing experience — exfoliation, a soothing massage and deep hydration that leaves your feet soft, smooth and perfectly polished.
It's more than polish. We take the time to address rough heels, dry skin and overgrown cuticles, so you walk out feeling lighter, not just looking better.
feet.whyUs: Feet carry you all day and deserve real expertise. Our technicians deliver a pedicure that's both therapeutic and relaxing, in a spotless, welcoming setting across all five Pure Nail Bar studios.
included: A warm soak to soften skin and ease tension
Nail shaping and thorough cuticle care
Gentle exfoliation to remove rough, dry skin
A relaxing lower-leg and foot massage
Deep hydration and your choice of polish
Smoothing of calluses at the heels and pressure points
addons: Gel polish for a longer-lasting, chip-resistant finish
Extra massage time for a true spa session
feet.aftercare: Moisturise your feet daily, especially the heels, and reapply after showering when skin absorbs best. If you chose gel polish, it's ready immediately; regular polish needs a little drying time, so wear open shoes home.
feet.hygiene: We take hygiene seriously: tools sterilized to hospital-grade standards after every use, single-use items discarded, and a spotless setup for every guest.

faq.q: What makes a spa pedicure different?
faq.a: Beyond shaping and polish, a spa pedicure includes exfoliation, a relaxing massage and deep hydration for soft, rejuvenated feet.

faq.q: Can I get gel polish on a pedicure?
faq.a: Yes. Gel polish keeps toes looking fresh for weeks and is a popular choice before vacations and sandal season.

faq.q: How often should I get a pedicure?
faq.a: Every four to six weeks keeps feet healthy and smooth, though many clients come more often in summer or before special occasions.

feet.metaTitle: Spa Pedicures in Vancouver | Pure Nail Bar
feet.metaDescription: Relaxing spa pedicures with exfoliation, massage and deep hydration. Book online — from $40.

wax.title: Waxing in Vancouver
wax.heroAlt: Calm, clean waxing treatment room at Pure Nail Bar
intro: Smooth, comfortable and quick — our waxing service covers everything from eyebrow shaping to a full bikini wax. Our technique is designed to keep you as comfortable as possible for a fast, low-stress experience.
Waxing removes hair from the root, so results last far longer than shaving and regrowth comes back softer and finer over time.
wax.whyUs: Waxing is as much about comfort and trust as technique. Clients return to us because we're fast, gentle and genuinely discreet, in a clean and welcoming space.
included: Eyebrow shaping and facial waxing
Underarm, arm and full or half leg waxing
Bikini and full bikini (Brazilian) waxing
A technique focused on comfort and speed
Smooth results that last weeks, not days
Discreet, professional service in a private setting
addons: Brow tint to complete and define your shape
Combine multiple areas in one visit to save time
wax.duration: From about 10 minutes (brows) to 45 minutes (larger areas).
wax.aftercare: For the first 24–48 hours, avoid hot baths, saunas, swimming and direct sun, and skip heavy workouts — freshly waxed skin is sensitive. Start gentle exfoliation after a couple of days to prevent ingrown hairs.
wax.hygiene: We never compromise on cleanliness: disinfected stations, single-use applicators where appropriate, and tools sterilized after every use.

faq.a: Most clients stay smooth for three to four weeks. With regular visits, regrowth becomes finer over time.

faq.q: How long should hair be before waxing?
faq.a: About a quarter-inch (roughly two to three weeks of growth) lets the wax grip properly for the cleanest result.
There's a brief sensation, but our technique is designed to minimize discomfort, and it eases with regular visits.

wax.metaTitle: Waxing in Vancouver | Pure Nail Bar
wax.metaDescription: Eyebrow to full-body waxing with a comfort-first technique. Smooth results that last. Book online — from $15.

lashes.title: Lash Extensions in Vancouver
lashes.heroAlt: Close-up of natural-looking lash extensions applied at Pure Nail Bar
intro: Wake up ready with lash extensions from Pure Nail Bar. We offer classic, hybrid and volume sets, each tailored to your eye shape and the look you want — from a soft, natural enhancement to full, dramatic volume.
Our technicians map the set to your eyes — adjusting curl, length and density across the lash line — so the result flatters your features and feels weightless.
lashes.whyUs: Lash work demands patience and a steady hand. Clients choose us for a real consultation, a clean and controlled setup, and honest guidance on the style and refill schedule that works for you.
included: A consultation to choose the right style for your eyes
Your choice of classic, hybrid or volume sets
Lightweight, comfortable, isolated application
Natural-looking length, curl and density
A look mapped to flatter your individual eye shape
Aftercare guidance to protect your lashes and extend wear
addons: Lash refills to maintain a full, fresh look
Extra volume for weddings and special occasions
lashes.duration: About 60–120 minutes for a full set, depending on the style.
lashes.aftercare: Keep lashes dry for the first 24 hours while the adhesive cures, then avoid oil-based cleansers and heavy rubbing. Brush them gently each morning and book a refill every two to three weeks.
lashes.hygiene: Eyes deserve extra care. We work in a clean, controlled setup with sterilized tools and disinfected stations.

faq.q: How long do lash extensions last?
faq.a: A full set lasts the natural growth cycle of your lashes — usually six to eight weeks. A refill every two to three weeks keeps them looking full.

faq.q: Will extensions damage my natural lashes?
faq.a: Applied correctly, they don't. Our technicians match the weight and length to your natural lashes and share aftercare so your own lashes stay healthy.

faq.q: What's the difference between classic, hybrid and volume?
faq.a: Classic adds one extension per natural lash for a defined look; volume fans multiple ultra-fine lashes for fullness; hybrid blends both for a textured, natural-yet-full effect.

lashes.metaTitle: Lash Extensions in Vancouver | Pure Nail Bar
lashes.metaDescription: Classic, hybrid and volume lash extensions tailored to you. Natural to dramatic. Book online — from $90.

hair.title: Hair Services in Vancouver
hair.heroAlt: Polished hair styling at Pure Nail Bar
intro: Complete your look with our hair services. From a fresh blow-dry to special-occasion styling, our experienced stylists deliver a polished finish in the same relaxing, modern setting you love for your nails.
Every appointment starts with a quick consultation so the result suits your hair, your features and the occasion.
hair.whyUs: One studio for nails, lashes and hair means a seamless, pampering experience — and the same standard of premium products and spotless hygiene throughout.
included: A consultation to plan your look
Wash, blow-dry and finishing
Special-occasion and event styling
Premium, professional-grade products
A relaxing, modern studio setting
Friendly, experienced stylists
addons: Treatment add-ons for shine and hydration
hair.duration: About 30–90 minutes, depending on the service.
hair.aftercare: Use a gentle, sulphate-free shampoo and limit heat styling between visits to keep your finish looking fresh for longer.
hair.hygiene: Tools and stations are cleaned and sanitized between every client, following the same strict standards as the rest of the studio.

faq.q: Do I need to book ahead for hair?
faq.a: Booking ahead guarantees your stylist and time, especially for events and weekends. Call your nearest location to arrange.

faq.q: Can I combine hair with nails or lashes?
faq.a: Yes — many clients pair services in one visit. Let us know when booking so we can schedule enough time.

hair.metaTitle: Hair Services in Vancouver | Pure Nail Bar
hair.metaDescription: Blow-dry, styling and special-occasion hair services in a relaxing studio. Book online — from $35.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.intro: Everything you need to know before your visit to Pure Nail Bar.

items.q: Where are Pure Nail Bar locations?
items.a: We have five studios across Greater Vancouver: Killarney, Kitsilano West 4th, Morgan Crossing (Surrey), Olympic Village and Renfrew Heights. See our Locations page for addresses and hours.

items.q: Do you take walk-ins or is it appointment only?
items.a: Both. We welcome walk-ins when chairs are open, but booking ahead guarantees your time — especially evenings and weekends.

items.q: How do I book an appointment?
items.a: Book online any time through our Book Online page (powered by Booker), or call your nearest location directly.
Gel manicures, acrylic full sets, nail art, spa pedicures, waxing, lash extensions and hair services. See our Services page for details.

items.q: How do you keep tools and stations clean?
items.a: We follow hospital-grade sterilization protocols. Tools are sanitized after every client, single-use items are discarded, and every station is sanitized between appointments.
Yes — gift cards make a great present and can be purchased online for any amount, delivered by email or printed at home.

items.q: How long do gel nails and lash extensions last?
items.a: Gel manicures typically last 2–3 weeks; lash extensions last the natural lash cycle with a refill every 2–3 weeks. We'll share aftercare tips at your visit.

careers.heading: Careers
body: We're always looking for talented, certified nail technicians, lash artists and friendly front-desk team members who share our commitment to quality, hygiene and artistry.
At Pure Nail Bar you'll work in a supportive, professional environment across five thriving locations, with premium products and a loyal, growing client base.
Interested? Send your resume and a note about yourself through our contact form, or drop into the location nearest you.

press.heading: Press
body: Pure Nail Bar is Vancouver's premier nail studio — a serene, stylish sanctuary where elegance meets precision in the art of nail care, with five locations across Greater Vancouver.
For press enquiries, interviews, photography or partnership opportunities, please get in touch through our contact form and our team will respond promptly.

pureParties.heading: Pure Parties
pureParties.intro: Celebrate together in a private, pampering setting.
body: Make your next celebration unforgettable with a Pure Party. Whether it's a birthday, a bridal shower or a corporate get-together, we'll host your group for a relaxing afternoon of manicures, pedicures and pampering.
Group bookings can be tailored to your party size and chosen services. Reach out through our contact form or call your nearest location to plan the perfect event.

franchising.heading: Franchising
franchising.intro: Bring Pure Nail Bar to your community.
body: Pure Nail Bar is a proven, premium nail-care brand with a loyal client base and a refined, repeatable studio experience. As we grow, we're exploring franchising partnerships with operators who share our standards.
If you're interested in opening a Pure Nail Bar in your area, get in touch through our contact form and we'll share more about the opportunity.

terms.heading: Terms & Conditions
intro: At Pure Nail Bar, our goal is to give every client a relaxed, professional and high-quality experience. So that everything goes smoothly — and everyone is treated fairly — we invite you to read the policies below before your appointment. By booking with us, you accept these terms.
These policies apply to all services offered at every Pure Nail Bar location.

blocks.text: Booking an appointment is recommended to reserve the time and technician of your choice. Walk-in clients are welcome, subject to availability.
Please arrive 5 to 10 minutes before your appointment time for check-in.
Out of respect for our team and other clients, we ask for at least 24 hours' notice for any cancellation or change to an appointment.
Late cancellations or no-shows may incur a fee, and certain bookings may require a deposit at the time of booking. Any such fees are communicated to you when you book.

Prices are shown in Canadian dollars and are subject to applicable taxes. The final price may vary depending on length, design complexity and add-ons; any surcharge is communicated before the service begins.
We accept cash, debit and major credit cards. Tips are appreciated but never required.

items: Gift cards can be purchased online for any amount and delivered by email or printed at home.
Gift cards are non-refundable and should be treated like cash.
We cannot replace a lost or stolen gift card.

blocks.text: Your satisfaction matters to us. Please check the result before leaving so any concern can be addressed right away. If you notice a technical issue with your service after you leave, contact us within 7 days so we can assess the situation and, where appropriate, provide a complimentary fix for the same shape, length and design.
Changes of preference, normal wear and damage from daily life or at-home care are not covered.

items: All tools and surfaces are disinfected to public-health and industry standards.
Single-use instruments are discarded after each client.
Reusable instruments are sterilized to hospital-grade standards.
Workstations are sanitized between every appointment.

blocks.text: Please reschedule if you are unwell, and let us know of any medical condition, allergy or sensitivity so we can adapt the service safely.
By booking and receiving services at Pure Nail Bar, you acknowledge that you have read and accepted these policies. We thank you for choosing us and look forward to taking care of you.

terms.updated: Last updated: May 22, 2026 — Pure Nail Bar · Vancouver, BC

privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Pure Nail Bar collects, uses and protects your personal information when you visit our website, book an appointment or receive our services.
By using our website or our services, you accept the practices described in this policy.

items: Contact details you provide when booking or sending a message (name, phone, email).
Appointment details: services booked, date, time and service history.
Newsletter subscriptions: your email address, if you choose to join.
Limited technical data (device type, pages viewed) to operate and improve the site.
Schedule, confirm and manage your appointments;
Respond to requests sent through our contact form;
Send offers and updates if you subscribe to our newsletter;
Meet our legal and accounting obligations.

blocks.text: We do not sell your personal information and do not share it for marketing purposes without your consent. We share information with service providers (for example, our online booking platform) only as needed to deliver their services.
You can unsubscribe from our newsletter at any time, and you may request access to or correction of your information by contacting us.
We use reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your information against unauthorized access, use or disclosure.

privacy.updated: Last updated: May 22, 2026 — Pure Nail Bar · Vancouver, BC
